chain.thought: Explanation: The condition “more than a certain score yet at most that score” is contradictory, as it requires a total to be simultaneously greater than and less than or equal to the same score. Therefore, no participant can satisfy this condition.

judge_thought: Explanation: The condition "more than a certain score yet at most that score" is self-contradictory; no participant can have a total that is simultaneously greater than and at most the same threshold. Therefore, the count of participants satisfying this condition is zero.
